word: G1816 - ἐξανατέλλω - exanatéllō - ex-an-at-el'-lo - Spring up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξανατέλλω

- Transliteration: Exanatello

- Phonetic: ex-an-at-el'-lo

- Definition:

1. to make spring up, cause to shoot forth

2. to spring up

- Origin: from G1537 and G393

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G393; to start up out of the ground that is germinate: - spring up.
